name: Peanut Pie
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:05
Combine eggs, sugar, and corn syrup, mixing well. Stir in peanuts, butter, and vanilla. Pour the filling into the pastry shell. Bake at 325 degrees for 55 minutes or until filling is set. Cool on a wire rack. Yield: one 9-inch pie.
